title: Module Map
description: Schema for module_map.yaml, defining Terraform module category mappings.

category.description: The category label for this group of modules (e.g. 'AWS General', 'GCP').

path.description: Relative filesystem path to the module directory.

submodules_depth.description: How many levels deep to traverse for submodules.

ignore.description: List of directory name patterns to ignore when scanning for modules.
